goals.title: Use Computer Use / OS-level GUI automation to properly test the ATLAS...
goals.objective: Use Computer Use / OS-level GUI automation to properly test the ATLAS Perforce split-root UI. The running UI must be driven through a real desktop browser/app surface, not only API calls. Verify localRoot and scmRoot are different paths, stream selection exposes two streams, and Add, Sync, Edit, and Submit operate between Local Root and Perforce SCM Root against a real local p4d server. Capture action logs, screenshots, and depot/local state evidence.

successCriteria.scenario: Computer Use happy path: drive Safari/ATLAS Perforce split-root UI against real local p4d; Local Root and SCM Root are different paths; directory panes are navigated by folder clicks; middle actions are Add, Checkout, Sync only; bottom Pending Submit completes Add submit; Checkout appears in Pending List; Sync copies from Perforce to Local Root; no files remain opened.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: C001/C005 evidence includes Computer Use screenshots, split-root paths, Add pending and Submit depot verification, Checkout pending evidence, Sync restore evidence, and final p4 opened clean cleanup receipts.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Latest C005 Computer Use/Safari split-root p4d proof: Local Root /tmp/atlas_p4_split_ui_1780364766_75182/project/split_ip and SCM Root /tmp/atlas_p4_split_ui_1780364766_75182/perforce_workspace differ; directory root screenshots C005-directory-root-buttons.png, C005-local-dir-modified-missing.png, C005-depot-dir-basename.png; Sync evidence C005-sync-restored-same.png; Add pending C005-add-pending-latest.png and p4 opened C005-add-opened-latest.txt; bottom Submit C005-submit-latest.png and depot verify C005-add-submit-verify.txt; Checkout pending C005-checkout-pending-latest.png and p4 opened C005-checkout-opened-latest.txt; cleanup C005-checkout-revert-cleanup.txt, C005-opened-clean-final.txt, and C005-process-cleanup-latest.txt show no files opened and no UI/p4d listeners left.

successCriteria.scenario: Computer Use edge case: attempt an invalid/empty UI action in the Perforce tab and prove the UI/API refuses it without leaving Perforce opened files.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: C002 evidence includes Computer Use/browser action log, screenshot or UI text for the invalid action, HTTP/p4 verification that no opened files remain, and cleanup receipt.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Computer Use/Safari selected only Perforce folder target //GOOD_SOC/GOOD_IP/rtl/ and clicked Checkout; UI rejected it with 'select Perforce files to checkout'. Evidence: C002-folder-checkout-rejected.png and C002-folder-checkout-rejected-opened.txt. cleanup: p4 opened clean; no pending files left opened.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: stream selector exposes //GOOD_SOC/GOOD_IP and //GOOD_SOC/GOOD_IP_DEV, Local Root and SCM Root remain independent, directory-mode Perforce UI has Add/Checkout/Sync only, env client override selects the p4 client, and existing split-root unit/frontend/build checks pass.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: C003/C005 evidence includes stream/root screenshots, pytest/Vitest/build output, diff-check/LSP output, and env client override unit assertions.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Final C007 regression/gate: Python regression C007-python-regression-final.txt shows 32 passed, 1 skipped, 2 deselected; frontend regression C007-frontend-regression-final.txt shows 7 passed; tsc --noEmit receipt C007-frontend-typecheck-final.txt shows exit_code 0 with no diagnostics; Vite build C007-frontend-build-final.txt passed; diff-check C007-git-diff-check-final.txt clean; C007-ai-slop-cleaner-report.txt passed with residual oversized-file warning. Prior C003/C005/C006 evidence covers stream selector, split roots, directory-mode actions, env/.env client override, and cleanup receipts.

goals.evidence: C001/C002/C003 all pass. ATLAS Perforce split-root UI was driven through a real Safari/Computer Use desktop surface against local p4d; Local Root and SCM Root differ; two streams are exposed; directory panes navigate by folder clicks; middle actions are Add/Checkout/Sync only; bottom Pending Submit submits; Checkout appears in Pending List; Sync restores local files from Perforce; env/.env client override is covered; cleanup receipts show no opened files or temporary listeners left. Final C007 regression gate passes Python, Vitest, tsc --noEmit, Vite build, and git diff-check.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e8515-13e8-7591-bec9-79c442364d58/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e8515-13e8-7591-bec9-79c442364d58/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: C001/C002/C003 all pass. ATLAS Perforce split-root UI was driven through a real Safari/Computer Use desktop surface against local p4d; Local Root and SCM Root differ; two streams are exposed; directory panes navigate by folder clicks; middle actions are Add/Checkout/Sync only; bottom Pending Submit submits; Checkout appears in Pending List; Sync restores local files from Perforce; env/.env client override is covered; cleanup receipts show no opened files or temporary listeners left. Final C007 regression gate passes Python, Vitest, tsc --noEmit, Vite build, and git diff-check.
